Learning Application and Research Center

About the Center

Manager Message

MENU

Dear Stakeholders,

As the Center for Learning Practices and Research, we increasingly recognize the importance of digital transformation and innovative learning models in education. Aligned with our university’s vision, our center aims to provide more effective, efficient, and flexible learning experiences for both students and faculty by leveraging technology to its fullest potential.

Through our learning management system, seamlessly integrated with face-to-face education, we facilitate access to course materials, promote interactive learning environments, and empower students to take charge of their own learning journeys. Moreover, our online programs and courses, supported by innovative educational methods, enable learning to transcend the constraints of time and location.

Another key mission of our center is to enhance the academic reputation and value of our university by developing processes aligned with international accreditations, ranking and quality standards. By utilizing CRM systems, we consistently monitor student satisfaction and success, striving to support every individual in their educational journey.

Our educational philosophy embraces diversity, equity, and inclusivity as core values. We believe in the right of every individual to equal opportunities and are committed to fostering a safe and supportive learning environment where all members of our academic community feel empowered to express themselves.

Your feedback and suggestions are of utmost importance to us in this journey. With a strong spirit of teamwork, we remain dedicated to advancing the quality of education in all the initiatives we undertake.

Asst. Prof. Emel KOÇ

Learning Application and Research Center Manager
